author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: Command name is /beads-design. Clean, descriptive, follows beads-* naming convention.

author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: Architecture is delegation -- orchestrator calls existing /beads-brainstorm, /beads-plan, /beads-deepen, /beads-plan-review in sequence. Zero code duplication. Updates to individual commands automatically propagate.

author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: Smart pauses -- interactive brainstorm phase, auto-run plan, pause to confirm plan before deepen, then auto-chain deepen + plan-review.

author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: Phase gates with recovery -- each phase runs its existing verification. On failure, pause and offer retry/skip/abort.

author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: Auto-apply safe feedback from plan-review. Only pause for trade-off decisions requiring user judgment.

author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: Default to Comprehensive detail level (user can override). This command is for the full thorough pipeline.

author: Roberto Mello
text: DECISION: No skip flags. Auto-detect existing brainstorm context from bead ID. Keep the interface simple.

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: Follows /lfg precedent for compound commands that chain multiple steps.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: Parallelism is preserved from existing commands -- each already maximally parallel internally (deepen spawns 20-40+ agents, plan-review runs 4 agents concurrently). Model hints (haiku/sonnet/opus) inherited.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: Output style is progress banners at phase transitions + clear verification status per phase + final consolidated summary with epic bead ID, child bead count, decisions captured, and review findings.

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: Follow pdf-design-medsimples.md rule at ~/.claude/rules/pdf-design-medsimples.md for exact colors and builder patterns.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: ensure_fonts_registered() is in app/utils/pdf_fonts.py. get_logo_path() is in app/utils/logo_utils.py. Both are already used by existing generators.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: The teal color was introduced in the last commit. ACCENT was blue (#2563EB) before — confirm all old blue references are replaced with PRIMARY (#0F766E).

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: Authorization pattern from medical_service.py:generate_visit_summary_pdf lines 1181-1200: query Visit joined to Doctor, filter Doctor.user_id == user_id unless is_admin.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: rx_template_types with requires_medications=True: id=2 Receita Medica Simples, id=5 Antimicrobiano, id=6 Controle Especial.

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: Existing generate_prescription_pdf in medical_service.py:1497 is the reference for content — replicate its data assembly logic (queries Visit, RxVisit with joinedload) but use design.py builders for rendering.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: generate_prescription_pdf is NOT exposed via any router endpoint currently — confirmed by research. Safe to remove after this generator is wired up.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: fill_receita.py is at medsimples/backend/util/fill_receita.py — use its build() function as direct reference. The MedLine Flowable class and two-frame layout are the critical pieces to port.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: ICP badge currently at medsimples/assets/icp-badge.png. Must be accessible from within the service at runtime — copy to backend/app/static/ and resolve path relative to this file.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: Validity date = visit_date + 30 days. Emission date = visit_date (not today). Both formatted dd/mm/YYYY.

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: GET /{visit_id}/pdf in visits.py:135 is the exact pattern to follow for the FileResponse and auth dependency.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: require_clinical_access() is the correct dependency (not get_current_user_with_rls directly) — matches the existing PDF endpoint pattern.

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: handleDownloadVisitPdf in VisitDetail.tsx is the exact authenticated blob download pattern to replicate for prescription download.

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: VisitDetailHeader.tsx props interface must be extended with onEmitirReceita callback and a loading flag following the existing onDownloadPdf/downloadingPdf pattern.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: GET /api/visits/{id}/document-types endpoint returns [{id, name, description}] filtered to registered generators. Frontend should use this to build the type selector dynamically, not hardcode type IDs.

author: Roberto Mello
text: FACT: Skills required per CLAUDE.md: design-taste-frontend, frontend-design, vercel-react-best-practices. Run react-doctor after implementation.

author: Roberto Mello
text: LEARNED: npx smoke tests need conditional bd install step (same pattern as test-installation job) — bd not in CI by default

author: Roberto Mello
text: PATTERN: execFileSync with array args prevents shell injection entirely — use instead of execSync with template strings for any user-controlled input

author: Roberto Mello
text: LEARNED: Command counts must be consistent across README, CATALOG, plugin.json description, pre-release-check.sh, and CI yaml — update all 5 locations when adding commands
